language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM only. No Cyrillic in taskpack internal files.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM for JSON, schemas, scripts, validators, machine receipts, and contracts unless an existing canon explicitly requires otherwise.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Owner-facing live response and final summary MUST be Russian after OFFICIO role entry and must be routed through OFFICIO authority.

language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: Only OFFICIO-routed owner-facing runtime output may use Russian. Machine artifacts stay ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM.
